# env

**Purpose**
Per-environment scoped workspace configuration. An environment names a workspace (one team member √ó one `env_dir` √ó a stage range √ó MNO/release scope √ó objectives) so multiple contributors can run partial pipelines in parallel without stepping on each other's outputs. Serves FR-28 (env_dir CLI/config/UI parameterization), FR-29 (single-root partition layout); implements D-022 (per-env directory layout).

**Public surface**
- `EnvironmentConfig` (config.py) ‚Äî the dataclass: `name`, `description`, `created_by`, `member`, `env_dir`, `stage_start/end`, `mnos`, `releases`, `doc_types`, `objectives`, `model_provider/name/timeout`; exposes `save_json()`, `load_json()`, `validate()`, `active_stages`, `env_dir_path`, `path(key)`, `input_path(mno, release)`, `out_path(stage)`, `state_path()`, `corrections_path()`, `correction_file(artifact)`, `reports_path()`, `eval_path()`, `init_directories()`
- Registry constants: `PIPELINE_STAGES`, `STAGE_NAMES`, `STAGE_NUM`, `NUM_STAGE`, `STAGE_DESC`, `ENV_DIR_DIRS`
- `resolve_stage(value)` ‚Äî accepts either stage name or 1-based number, returns canonical name
- `env_cli.main` ‚Äî CLI: `stages | create | list | show | init | delete`

**Invariants**
- `PIPELINE_STAGES` is the **single source of truth** for stage names and ordering across the project; any other module listing stages must import from here.
- `env_dir` layout is fixed (D-022): `input/<MNO>/<release>/`, `out/<stage>/`, `state/`, `corrections/`, `reports/`, `eval/` (see `ENV_DIR_DIRS`). Other modules find artifacts by this convention, not by ad-hoc paths.
- `correction_file(artifact)` returns `None` when missing ‚Äî callers must handle absence; this is how the "optional override" semantics of corrections is enforced.
- `validate()` returns errors as a list (never raises) so CLI and Web UI can surface all problems at once.
- Environment configs live at `environments/<name>.json` (gitignored except `.gitkeep`) ‚Äî they are per-user, not committed.

**Key choices**
- Stage registry is a list of tuples (not an enum) so stages can be referenced by name, by 1-based number, or by description without three parallel definitions.
- `EnvironmentConfig` stores `env_dir` as a string (not `Path`) to keep JSON round-tripping trivial; `env_dir_path` property exposes it as a `Path` (rename from `document_root` / `doc_root` per D-022).
- Model provider/name/timeout live on the env config (not a separate model config file) ‚Äî keeps a run fully reproducible from one JSON artifact.

**Non-goals**
- Not a pipeline runner ‚Äî execution lives in [pipeline](../pipeline/MODULE.md); this module only defines the scope and paths.
- No secrets or credentials ‚Äî environment configs are human-editable JSON, safe to share for debugging.
- No runtime state (job IDs, metrics, logs) ‚Äî those belong in [web](../web/MODULE.md)'s SQLite stores.

<!-- BEGIN:STRUCTURE -->
_Alphabetical, regenerated by regen-map._

`config.py`
- `ENV_DIR_DIRS` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `EnvironmentConfig` ‚Äî dataclass ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Configuration for a pipeline environment.
  - `active_stages` ‚Äî property ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Stage names that will run, in order.
  - `correction_file` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get path to a correction file if it exists, else None.
  - `corrections_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get the corrections directory.
  - `env_dir_path` ‚Äî property ‚Äî pub
  - `eval_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get the eval directory (user-supplied Q&A pairs).
  - `init_directories` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Create the standard directory structure. Returns created dirs.
  - `input_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get input directory for a specific MNO and release (D-023).
  - `load_json` ‚Äî classmethod ‚Äî pub
  - `out_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get output directory for a specific pipeline stage.
  - `path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get a standard subdirectory under env_dir (generic accessor).
  - `reports_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get the reports directory.
  - `save_json` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub
  - `state_path` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Get the state directory (runtime SQLite DBs).
  - `validate` ‚Äî method ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Return list of validation errors (empty = valid).
- `NUM_STAGE` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `PIPELINE_STAGES` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `resolve_stage` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Convert a stage number or name to a canonical stage name.
- `STAGE_DESC` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `STAGE_NAMES` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `STAGE_NUM` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub

`env_cli.py`
- `_env_path` ‚Äî function ‚Äî internal
- `_load_env` ‚Äî function ‚Äî internal
- `cmd_create` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Create a new environment.
- `cmd_delete` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Delete an environment config.
- `cmd_init` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Initialize the directory structure for an environment.
- `cmd_list` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî List all environments.
- `cmd_show` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî Show environment details.
- `cmd_stages` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub ‚Äî List all pipeline stages.
- `ENVS_DIR` ‚Äî constant ‚Äî pub
- `main` ‚Äî function ‚Äî pub
